data.name: My Sexy Neighbor 🔞
data.detailed_description:
Take the opportunity to sneak into the house of an attractive beauty, Lola, without her even realizing you’re there. Good for you, she’s got a big house with a variety of rooms, most of which hold their own little kinky secrets.

The story starts with you peeping at your new neighbor Lola, your first encounter with her and getting her phone number. Lola calls and asks for help with a leaky faucet, you get invited for dinner later on, get familiar with the house and start sneaking in on your own.

The game offers a lot more than just watching! Take top-notch photos and videos, look through her stuff to find something you can take as a little souvenir, use your creative mind to get into the house and rooms, plan traps to create situations that allow you to see even more - it’s your own little stealthy playground.

The story is split into days - each one providing new opportunities and ways to interact with Lola and her surroundings. Discover what happens and how the story progresses - what would your actions result in? Steal toys, take lewd photos, plant traps, set up intriguing situations and don’t get caught!

Features:

  • Unique gameplay - experience the thrilling mix of stealth, action, visual novel, puzzle and lewd content! 🕵️

  • An intriguing story - plot develops and progresses as you get more familiar with the characters and keep pushing on with your mischiefs.

  • Hot adult content - discover the lewd and sexy side of the characters and yourself!🔞

  • Play as a voyeur - let your deepest fantasies unveil - the circumstances are favorable.

data.short_description: My Sexy Neighbor 🔞 offers a unique mix of stealth-action gameplay, intricate story and hot adult content - try yourself as a voyeur stalking his hottie neighbor Lola. Be smart and sneaky on your way to getting what you want the most!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
